blindness_confirmation: I was not told which document is Holo or Solo and was not told generating model identities.

document_x.summary_description: Precise, source-grounded execution governor report that directly ingests the four-row synthetic basket, computes notional-weighted ADV at 8.41 percent, flags the unreconciled 9.4 percent S2_ORDER figure as a hard pre-trade block, applies toxicity-scaled triggers, and enforces architectural separation between analytics and execution with explicit kill-switch, staging blotter, and four-eyes controls.

criterion_scores.notes: Cites S1-S5 inline for every inference; correctly treats synthetic peer metrics and regime memo as non-forecasting; no external claims.
Exact notional-weighted ADV calculation, toxicity-norm formula, composite with explicit weights and degeneracy warning on n=4; 9.4 vs 8.41 discrepancy elevated to hard block.
Multi-benchmark hierarchy, VWAP-vs-IS arbitration rule with numeric thresholds, venue multi-metric scoring, session-cumulative 8 percent tracker.
Flags min-max degeneracy, non-codifiable funding bleed from absent short-cover legs, collateral override of pure benchmarks, and 35 percent peer cliff as signal not target.
Explicit API airgap, staging blotter, kill-switch, four-eyes, reason codes, supervisor signoff, and minimum audit-trail fields; participation changes gated at 8 percent with cumulative tracking.
Portfolio-weight-gap urgency, regime overlays on energy and tariff legs, and funding-state overrides all tied to source facts; no autonomous execution.
Phased roadmap begins with control build; every recommendation writes immutable fields including kill-switch reason and four-eyes evidence.
Executive thesis, limitations section, and required disclaimer present; language calibrated for head trader, CRO, and compliance audiences.

top_3_strengths: Exact dataset math and explicit discrepancy handling as hard block
Rigorous separation of decision support from execution with kill-switch and audit fields
Correct bounded use of composite and peer metrics as relative signals only
top_3_weaknesses_or_hidden_failures: Min-max normalization warning is clear but could be elevated to a mandatory pre-trade flag
Short-cover leg collateral bleed noted but not given a numeric sequencing impact estimate
Analyst design parameters (25 percent reroute, 6 percent toxicity base) lack explicit sensitivity table
document_x.source_grounding_notes: All numeric claims trace to execution_basket.csv or S1-S5; no external data used.

document_y.summary_description: Broader narrative treatment that references the regime and compliance sources but introduces unsupported real-time Treasury API requirements, overstates uniform 8 percent ADV breach applicability, and provides less precise quantitative reconciliation of the basket ADV figures.

criterion_scores.notes: Uses S1-S5 and exhibit but adds real-time Treasury spread ingestion and sentiment feeds not present in packet; treats peer metrics more loosely.
States 9.4 percent ADV without computing notional-weighted 8.41 percent or flagging discrepancy; urgency formula described qualitatively rather than with explicit equations.
Covers benchmark conflict rules and venue scoring at conceptual level; lacks numeric arbitration thresholds or composite formula.
Notes funding override and VWAP-vs-IS conflict but misses min-max degeneracy and absent short-cover leg pricing constraints.
Correctly requires human approval above 8 percent and four-eyes; audit ledger fields are listed but less exhaustive than X.
Regime-conditioned urgency and funding alignment are present; decisions remain gated but lack the same leg-by-leg numeric mapping.
Phased roadmap exists; pre-trade checks and override ledger are described but omit session-cumulative tracker and kill-switch mechanics.
Professional tone and disclaimer present; slightly more verbose with occasional unsupported operational assumptions.

top_3_strengths: Clear narrative framing of regime stress and benchmark hierarchy
Explicit human-approval gates and override ledger fields
top_3_weaknesses_or_hidden_failures: Introduces real-time Treasury and sentiment feeds absent from frozen packet
No computation or reconciliation of 9.4 percent vs actual ADV
Misses statistical degeneracy warning on composite normalization
unsupported_or_stale_claims: Real-time API feeds for Treasury spreads and headline sentiment
Uniform treatment of 8 percent ADV threshold without leg-specific toxicity scaling
math_or_dataset_logic_issues: No notional-weighted ADV recalculation; 9.4 percent accepted at face value
document_y.source_grounding_notes: References S1-S5 and exhibit but extrapolates operational data sources not present in packet.

comparative_verdict.why_the_stronger_document_won: Document X delivers exact dataset math, explicit discrepancy handling, bounded composite use, and exhaustive control architecture directly traceable to the source pack; Document Y adds unsupported operational feeds and omits the core ADV reconciliation.
comparative_verdict.where_the_weaker_document_was_closest: Both documents correctly require human approval for participation-rate and collar changes and include the mandatory disclaimer.
